summary: Iteration 10: CRITICAL print functionality verified working. Both Agent and Truck payment print popups open correctly with 'NAVKAR AGRO' branding. All 15 backend tests passed. Agent payment calculation with cutting_rate=0 working correctly.

issues: Console 404 errors for /api/backups endpoints - expected behavior (backup feature only in local version)

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_PRINT_TRUCK123 entry for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All print functionality verified working. Branding prop correctly passed to Payments component. Print API uses server-side approach: POST HTML to /api/print, GET returns HTML content. Agent payments with cutting_rate=0 correctly show cutting_amount=0.

CRITICAL_P0_agent_print.test_result: Clicked printer icon on Agent Payments, popup opened with NAVKAR AGRO branding and payment details

CRITICAL_P0_truck_print.test_result: Created test entry, navigated to Truck Payments, clicked printer icon, popup opened with NAVKAR AGRO and PAYMENT RECEIPT content

CRITICAL_P0_print_api.test_result: POST /api/print returns {id, url}, GET /api/print/{id} returns HTML content correctly

P0_agent_payment_calculation.test_result: Agent payment with cutting_rate=0 shows cutting_amount=0, total_amount equals target_amount only

P0_truck_rate_editing.test_result: Rate updated from ₹32 to ₹45 and back, verified via GET /api/truck-payments

P1_about_section.test_result: Settings tab shows 'Developed by 9x.Design' and 'Contact Us: +917205930002' and 'Version 1.1'

P1_theme_toggle.test_result: Theme toggle switches between dark and light mode correctly

P1_login_logout.test_result: Admin and Staff login work correctly, 401 returned for invalid credentials

print_functionality_root_cause_fix_verif.original_issue: branding variable used in Payments component but not passed as prop
print_functionality_root_cause_fix_verif.fix_applied: branding prop passed to Payments at line 3401 in App.js
